word: H25 - אֲבִי גִבְעֹון - ʼĂbîy Gibʻôwn - ab-ee' ghib-one' - Father of Gibeon

sections.paragraph:
Original: אבי גבעון

Transliteration: 'ăbı̂y gib‛ôn

Phonetic: ab-ee' ghib-one'

BDB Definition:

Abi Gibon = "father of Gibeon"
  1. site of great Bamah, location of the tabernacle of the Lord in the high place

Origin: from H1 and H1391

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
